codeReview.summary: Solid implementation of the Footer component with all required sections (company info, quick links, legal links, Fan Protect Guarantee trust banner). Clean integration into LayoutWrapper with admin page exclusion. Uses semantic HTML (<footer>), proper tap targets (min-h-[44px]), and responsive design (max-w-[600px], px-4). 29 comprehensive tests cover rendering, content, accessibility, and visual design. All validators pass (461 tests, typecheck clean, lint clean). Interactive verification confirms correct behavior at 375px viewport. Two minor non-blocking issues found in test code.

issues.description: Double render in 'displays trust icon' test: `render(<Footer />)` is called on line 115, then `const footer = render(<Footer />).container` on line 116 creates a second render. The first render's result is unused. Should be `const { container } = render(<Footer />)` with the first render removed. This is a test code smell — the test passes but renders the component twice unnecessarily, which could cause issues if the component had side effects.

Minor: `hideFooter` (line 24) is an exact duplicate of `hideTopNav` (line 23) — both are `pathname.startsWith('/admin')`. Could reuse the same variable (e.g., `const isAdminPage`) for DRY. However, separating them provides flexibility if footer/nav visibility rules diverge later, so this is a reasonable design choice.

sharedStateObservations.observation: architecture.md's Layout Architecture section says LayoutWrapper wraps with 'SessionProvider, LazyMotion, ToastProvider, BottomTabNavigation' but doesn't mention TopNavBar or Footer, both of which have now been added. This section is out of date and could mislead future workers about LayoutWrapper's actual composition.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md — 'Layout Architecture' section lists only 4 providers/components in LayoutWrapper. After this commit and the prior TopNavBar commit, LayoutWrapper now also includes TopNavBar and Footer with conditional rendering based on pathname.

summary: Footer component implementation passes review. All 5 feature requirements met: (1) Company info with logo, description, copyright; (2) Quick links with About, Help Center, Contact; (3) Legal links with Terms, Privacy, Cookie Policy; (4) Fan Protect Guarantee trust banner with Shield icon and description; (5) pb-16 spacing above bottom tab bar. Integrated into LayoutWrapper with admin page exclusion. Responsive at 375px with no horizontal overflow. 44px minimum tap targets on all links. 29 tests added. Two non-blocking issues: a double-render in one test and a duplicated boolean condition in LayoutWrapper. Worker followed the platform-worker skill procedure (TDD, validators, agent-browser verification).
